/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wall -g -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/IDTF.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libIDTF.so -o libIDTF.so CMakeFiles/IDTF.dir/libIDTF/SceneConverterLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTF.dir/IDTF/FileReferenceConverter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTF.dir/IDTF/ModifierConverter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/IDTF.dir/IDTF/Helpers/MiscUtilities.cpp.o
